rollback_goal: Return any patcher service/listener work to a safe on-demand Operator-only baseline while preserving evidence.
recommended_level: Level 1 or Level 3: disable service/listener behavior; keep alpha2 manifest validator unless rejected.

levels.name: Disable only
levels.description: Keep files but disable any service/listener entry point.

levels.name: Remove Operator integration
levels.description: Remove UI buttons/menu paths that trigger automatic patcher behavior.

levels.name: Revert service/listener commits
levels.description: Keep alpha2 validator and revert always-on service/listener commits.

levels.name: Revert all patcher commits
levels.description: Remove patcher subsystem entirely; not recommended unless direction is rejected.

git_guidance.pushed_history: Use git revert <commit_sha>; do not force push by default.
git_guidance.local_unpushed_work: Use branch/tag backup first; then selectively restore or revert files.

validation_after_rollback: python or script tests for patch manifest validation if available
confirm no service/scheduled task is enabled
confirm Patch Runner alpha2 remains validation-only if retained
